zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Aston於1265年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓時，他的父親Richard de Aston III19歲，母親Joan de Cliffee31歲。他於1293年與Lady Anabella de Rode在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在英國英格蘭爾塞頓享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Aston was born in 1265, in Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Aston III, was 19 and his mother, Joan de Cliffee, was 31. He married Lady Anabella de Rode in 1293, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1343, in Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

Il a épousé Lady Anabella de Rode en 1293, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1343, à Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

Er hat 1293 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England Lady Anabella de Rode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴
ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Aston(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Aston III(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cliffee(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1293년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Lady Anabella de Rode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 수턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: астон би суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Aston родился в 1265 г. в местности астон би суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Aston III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cliffee, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anabella de Rode в 1293 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1343 г. в местности суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
